title: chrysosplenium alternifolium subsp. arctomontanum
intro: Chrysosplenium alternifolium subsp. arctomontanum, also known as Mountain Golden Saxifrage or Western Golden Saxifrage, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Saxifragaceae family. It is a perennial herb with yellow flowers and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antiviral agent. Chrysosplenium alternifolium subsp. arctomontanum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to be used for medicinal purposes.
